# Copilot Instructions for Escape-room

## Project Overview

This is an **Escape Room** game where players connect electronic components to escape a room. The repository is in its early stages of development.

## Repository Structure

- `README.md` — Project description and documentation.
- `.github/` — GitHub configuration and Copilot instructions.

## General Guidelines

- Keep code clean, well-documented, and modular.
- Use descriptive variable and function names that relate to escape room and electronics concepts.
- Write clear commit messages that explain what changed and why.
- Include comments for any complex logic, especially around game mechanics and electronic component interactions.

## Contributing

- When adding new features, include appropriate tests.
- Update `README.md` when adding significant new functionality.
- Follow existing code style and conventions present in the repository.
